narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 3-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 719 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
